2.0:
After stepping into the Star Gate, 
the stone fragment in my backpack suddenly 
emitted an intense wave of heat.
 
I hurriedly took out the fragment, only to discover 
that what had been calm and stable all this 
time had begun to undergo a transformation—
2.2:
I have no idea what just happened.
The stone suddenly started glowing 
like crazy under those weird pulses...
2.3:
In the next moment, 
the stone suddenly started melting—
2.4:
"Ah… aaah!?   \w[60]
No, no—it's gonna spill out!!"
2.5:
As the stone unexpectedly and rapidly turned 
into liquid, I frantically rummaged through my 
backpack and pulled out a glass bottle, hastily 
collecting the red liquid still clinging to my hands.
2.7:
Could this be the Elixir Rubrum that my 
father mentioned...?
But why would it react inside this gate...?
2.8:
…Phew. Just in time—
I managed to get it into the bottle before it melted.
2.9:
This isn’t the first time something like this has happened…
and yet it still makes my heart race every single time.
2.10:
And still… I don’t understand
why all of this is happening in the first place…
2.11:
No matter the reason… as long as 
it’s the medicine I’m looking for, that’s enough.
